overlay.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.sleep: Made it through another day... will tomorrow be better?
I think I heard the wind outside. It sounded like someone crying.
Almost out of canned food. Have to scavenge again tomorrow.
Just sleep. You can't feel hunger in your dreams.
I dreamed of home before the disaster, laundry still drying on the balcony.
Checked the door bolt three times... should be fine. Should be.
How much battery is left in the flashlight? I don't dare to think.
If it rains tomorrow, remember to put the bucket out.
The other team's light is still on. Guess they can't sleep either.
Counting sheep. One, two... monster... three...
Saw a cat in the ruins today. It ran faster than me.
Another scratch on the wall. What day is it now?
Someone once said the scariest thing in the apocalypse isn't monsters — it's people.
I'd give anything for one sip of hot soup.
Bedtime prayer: no smog tomorrow, please.
There's always a faint whisper in my ear... it's my imagination. It has to be.
The blanket is too thin, but it's ten thousand times warmer than outside.
My turn to keep watch tomorrow... better sleep well tonight.
The static on the radio almost sounds like a melody sometimes.
I hid the last chocolate bar under my pillow.
Footsteps outside the door... ignore them. Sleep.
The wound doesn't hurt anymore. I hope that's not a bad sign.
There's still an unsearched area on the map. I'll check it tomorrow.
What I'd give for a real bed.
My teammate's snoring is somehow comforting now.
Almost didn't make it back today... I won't tell the others yet.
Three days of water left. Sip slowly.
Please, no more of those eyes in my dreams.
The torch is almost burned out. Anything could be in the dark.
Tomorrow I have to fix that generator. No excuses.
I wrote in my diary: today, everyone is still alive.
The wind rattles the window, like someone knocking.
Last thought before sleep: where did I put the key?
Maybe rescue comes tomorrow? Maybe.
My stomach is growling. Can't hear it with my eyes closed.
That book I found today is missing half its pages.
Don't overthink it. Being alive is already remarkable.
Only two pills left. Save them for whoever needs them most.
The stars are still there. The world isn't completely broken.
Good night. If there is a tomorrow.

info.screen.roleid.diviner:
Diviner (Passenger team)
Starts with a [Crystal Ball]. Right-click while aiming at a corpse to begin a 10-second channel (must stand still).
Upon completion, reveals: the victim's time of death + one random killer clue (3 types: ① killer alive/dead + killer name [??? at range, revealed when close]; ② killer's exact role; ③ killer globally highlighted for 1 sec).
Each use has 50% chance to break the crystal ball; can be repurchased for 300 coins; 60s cooldown; each corpse may only be divined once.
Special: if the target is the InsaneKiller disguised as a corpse, they stab themselves to death with a knife.
message.noellesroles.diviner.intro: §5✦ Diviner ✦ §rYou received the §dCrystal Ball§r: right-click on a corpse to begin a §6§l10-second channel§r — you must §cstand still§r. Cooldown %1$ss; repurchase for %2$s coins; each corpse only once.

info.screen.roleid.delayer:
Delayer (Killer team)
Passive: each kill extends the game by 20s; when 1m25s remain, extend by another 30s (once per round).
Active [Time Anchor]: press the ability key, spend 75 coins to anchor the current state; the anchor lasts 20s, then you automatically rewind (only yourself):
position, money and potion effects are restored; inventory and item cooldowns are NOT rewound. If you are dead by then, the rewind will not revive you.
The rewind is not a teleport - you glide back to the anchor ALONG your path: your position is sampled every 2s while anchored, then replayed in reverse.
While rewinding your screen shows the same gray time-stop filter; everyone else is briefly dazed with a glass-break sound. Cooldown 120s.
Warning: if you are hit while the anchor is still active (within 20s), you are forced to rewind immediately and end up prone, unable to move, for 30s.

info.screen.roleid.manipulator:
Killer Faction
Open your inventory to select and possess any player within 200 blocks. No prior mark is required. Your camera binds to their body and you drive them with the movement/jump keys.
While possessed the target is blinded and cannot move, use items, open their inventory or use skills; you cannot use their items, but you can cast their ability as them (cooldown on them).
Driving the puppet into the void bounces it back to avoid suicide. If the target dies while controlled, you gain 75 coins.
Open your inventory at any time to cancel control. Control cooldown is 80 seconds.

info.screen.roleid.dnf_killer:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Has independent blood system.
Automatically gains Throwing Knife and Crowbar at night.
Can spend blood to buy Throwing Knife and Lockpick.
Press skill key (G by default) to request aid.
Gain blood by consuming corpses, 10 blood per corpse.
Achieve personal ending win after accumulating enough blood.
Unlock personal ending after consuming enough corpses.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_soldier:
Sheriff Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Armed force of the Civilian faction.
Start with Baton and Revolver.
Win by killing all Killers.
Max 2 Soldiers at a time.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_chef:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Responsible for cooking food for passengers.
Can turn ingredients (cornmeal, flour, suspicious meat) into rations.
Press skill key (G by default) to process corpses (consumes capacity).
Starts with Chef Hat.
Has daily cooking capacity limit.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_psychologist:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Maintains mental health of passengers.
Restores others' sanity through:
- Cleaning spider webs in the library
- Giving lectures at the podium
- Using the toilet
- Cleaning dust in the prison
info.screen.roleid.dnf_locksmith:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Skilled in lockpicking.
Can use Lockpicks to open locked carriage doors.
Can also repair broken door locks (right-click door).
Max 4 Locksmiths at a time.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_civilian:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
No special abilities.
Need to survive until all Killers are dead.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_maniac:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Hidden helper of the Killers.
Can kill players at night.
Kills are recorded.
Max 2 at a time.
Stunned (but not killed) by gunshots.
No penalty for killing Killer faction players.
Can help Killers win.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_poisoner:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Can poison food.
Press skill key (G by default) to use poison.
Gains Toxic Heart for killing poisoned players.
Each Toxic Heart increases an extra kill count.
Can unlock special abilities via a book in the Underworld.
Max 1 at a time.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_abyss:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Can forcibly send targets to the Underworld using Abyss Tentacle.
Hold use key to charge and release area attack.
Hit targets get Slowness.
Gains invisibility and speed continuously.
Cannot move while charging.
Max 2 at a time.
Start with Abyss Tentacle.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_ghost:
Ghost Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Special class allowing continued gameplay after death.
Gains Ghost State effect, can phase through terrain.
Can see all players' positions after death.
Can interact with living players.

tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.brew_1.d: Set up the brewing station and brew your first post-apocalyptic batch.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.brew_2.d: Refine your brewing craft for smoother spirits.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.brew_3.d: Master the brewer's art — fine liquor trades well in the wasteland.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.potion_p: Craft the potion cleanser to strip away active potion effects.
Build the smelter and melt down basic metals.
Smelt alloys and forge tougher materials.
Refine precious metals and master top-tier metallurgy.
Craft plastic protective gear — better than nothing.
Craft the full plastic armor set for solid basic protection.
Forge alloy armor pieces for a major defensive boost.
Forge the full alloy armor set — armed to the teeth.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.func_arm: Craft armor pieces with special utility functions.
Craft advanced functional gear — protection without losing mobility.
Forge basic melee weapons — enough to defend yourself.
Forge fine melee weapons such as the saber.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.bullets_: Hand-load 9mm and .22WMR pistol rounds to get by.
Load 40mm grenades — expensive, but worth it.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.pistol_1: Assemble the Glock 17 and Taurus 943 — your first firepower.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.pistol_2: Build the CZ75, the ceiling of sidearm firepower.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.shotgun_: Saw off a double-barrel — two shells settle it up close.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.sniper_1: Build the Kar98k bolt-action and call your shots from afar.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.sniper_2: Build the AWP — one shot, one kill.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.smg.desc: Build the UZI and hose the room down.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.ammo_box: Craft an ammo box and carry rounds by the crate.
Build the SKS Tactical semi-automatic rifle.
Build the AK47 — the currency of the apocalypse.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.heavy_we: Build the M320 grenade launcher — one round clears a room.
Build the RPG-7 — the ultimate firepower in the apocalypse.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.laser_si: Mount a laser designator; even hip-fire goes where you point.
Craft the SRO red dot sight.
Craft the Vudu variable-zoom sniper scope.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.muzzle_1: Craft the Ptilopsis silencer to keep the noise down.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.muzzle_3: Craft the T-Rex brake to tame muzzle climb.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.muzzle_4: Craft the 6H3 bayonet and the Cthulhu brake.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.muzzle_5: Craft the Ursus silencer — a sniper's silence.
Craft the AK12 and MOE stocks.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.grip_1.d: Craft the RK6 and SE-5 grips.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.grip_2.d: Craft the Ranger vertical grip for steadier control.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.mag_1.de: Tier-1 extended mags for pistols, shotguns and snipers.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.mag_2.de: Tier-2 extended mags — even more rounds per reload.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.mag_3.de: Swap ammo types: AP, slug and FMJ.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.throwabl: Craft basic throwables — solve problems at a distance.
Craft tactical throwables like the decoy flare.
Craft advanced tactical throwables like smoke and marking grenades.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.power_fa: Craft battery banks and portable power cells.
Craft the power amplifier to boost generator output.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_smoke: Right-click to throw, creating a smoke area.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_marki: Right-click to throw. Affected players gain Glowing effect.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_flare: Right-click to throw, illuminating the area.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_band_: Slowly restores health and reduces pollution.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_power: Place next to a generator. Stores up to 300 seconds of power.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_porta: Right-click a generator to store/release power.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.vault: §eAttempting to pick the lock… Complete the mini-game to open the vault.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_power: Place on top of a generator to boost output.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.base_exp: Craft the simple expansion key to unlock new base areas.
Craft the medium expansion key — take the base to the next level.
Craft the exquisite expansion key and claim the entire base.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.base_fac: Craft base chests and other basic storage facilities.
Craft the base alarm — know the instant someone breaks in.
Build advanced base facilities — make the shelter feel like home.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.fuel_1.d: Refine basic fuel to power your machinery.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.fuel_2.d: Craft diesel cans to stockpile fuel in bulk.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.fuel_3.d: Aviation Kerosene: high-energy flight fuel, crafted in the Melting Pot.
Learn to tame horses — stop traveling on foot.
Master horse breeding for faster, hardier mounts.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.vehicle_: Restore vehicle chassis in preparation for assembly.
Assemble a motorcycle and race across the wasteland.
Assemble a car — the whole team rides at a moment's notice.
Craft a repair wrench to fix damaged vehicles.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.boat_1.d: Lash together a raft. No fuel needed — and no speed either.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.boat_2.d: Bolt on an outboard motor: the motorboat can outrun the swell.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.boat_3.d: Refit a fishing boat: four out to sea, and cargo on the way back.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.rv_upgra: Craft basic RV parts: Auxiliary Tank, Suspension, Winch, Skid Plate, Long Range Radio, Extra Seats.
Craft advanced RV parts: Reserve Tank, All-Terrain Tires, Armored Plating, Emergency Armor, Solar Panel, Nav Array, Tool Bench.
Craft elite RV parts: Economy Carburetor, Fuel Injector, Reinforced Frame, Field Repair Kit, Medical Bay, Roof Lights, Scouting Radar.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.sacrific: Offer sacrifices at the altar in exchange for unknown rewards.
Deeper sacrificial rites — the price and the reward are equally staggering.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.undying_: Craft the undying totem to survive a killing blow.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.revival_: Craft the revival totem to bring fallen teammates back to life.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.trap_cag: Craft a trap cage to capture wild animals using bait.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.capture_: Craft simple bait to capture chickens, pigs, and sheep.
Craft fragrant bait to also capture rabbits, cows, and wolves.
Craft refined bait to also capture horses, donkeys, and camels.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.wrenc: §cCannot dismantle functional blocks in other teams' shelters!
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_batte: Large battery. Right-click the generator for 360s of power (= Battery ×3).
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_luxur: Pumpkin, wild rice, mushrooms and fresh meat slow-cooked together. Eat: hunger +70, thirst +50, sanity +70, pollution -30, and cures sickness. True luxury in the apocalypse.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_one_p: Rotten flesh, bones and wild rice all thrown in one pot. Being edible is already a win. Eat: hunger +65, pollution -25.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_diese: A can of refined diesel: right-click the generator for 900s of power.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_aviat: High-octane aviation fuel, only used to refuel flying vehicles. Crafted in the Melting Pot.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_raft: Right-click water to place. Seats 2, needs no fuel — and won't get you anywhere fast. Sneak right-click to pick up.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_motor: Right-click water to place. Seats 2, fast; right-click with a fuel can to refuel — without fuel it won't move. Sneak right-click to pick up.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_fishi: Right-click water to place. Seats 4, 27 storage slots, 200 durability; right-click with a diesel can to refuel. Sneak right-click opens storage; right-click with a wrench to pick up.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_flyer: Right-click to place. 1-seat personal flying vehicle. W to accelerate (auto-ascends), A/D to turn, S to descend. Slowly falls when speed is zero. Right-click with Aviation Kerosene to refuel, sneak right-click to pick up.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_helic: Right-click to place. 3-seat flying vehicle. W to accelerate (auto-ascends), A/D to turn, S to descend. Faster speed and lift than the Flyer. Right-click with Aviation Kerosene to refuel, sneak right-click to pick up.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_airpl: Right-click to place. 6-seat large flying vehicle. W to accelerate (auto-ascends), A/D to turn, S to descend. Fastest speed and strongest lift. Right-click with Aviation Kerosene to refuel, sneak right-click to pick up.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.aircraft: Requires 70% of Transport tech tree unlocked. Assemble a personal Flyer — W to move, Space to rise, S to sink.
Helicopter: 3 seats, stronger main rotor lift and faster speed.
Fixed-wing Airplane: 6 seats. Cruising altitude — fastest and most stable. The sky is yours.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_sapli: §7Grows oak saplings only. Plant 1, harvest 1 sapling + 2 oak logs, 5% chance for an apple. 5 growth stages.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_medic: A medicinal leaf grown in the hydroponic box. Right-click to eat: restores 20 health and reduces 5 pollution.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.misc_pla: Craft a Hydroponic Box to grow Sugar Cane, Kelp, and Medicinal Fern in water.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_chick: Right-click to spawn a Chicken at your location
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_pig: Right-click to spawn a Pig at your location
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_sheep: Right-click to spawn a Sheep at your location
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_rabbi: Right-click to spawn a Rabbit at your location

tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_wolf: Right-click to spawn a Wolf at your location
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_horse: Right-click to spawn a Horse at your location
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_donke: Right-click to spawn a Donkey at your location
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_camel: Right-click to spawn a Camel at your location
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tech_: You must unlock all Medical technologies first
Requires unlocking 75% of all tech tree nodes

message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.potio: Your potion effects have been cleansed
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_vehic: Right-click a vehicle to restore 15 HP. Single-use.
Right-click a vehicle to restore 30 HP. Single-use. Vehicle Repair II.
Right-click a vehicle to restore 60 HP. Single-use. Vehicle Repair III.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_small: Right-click your door to restore 25% durability. Single-use.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_unive: Right-click your door to fully restore durability to 100%. Single-use.
tech.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.vehicle_: Craft a repair wrench. Restores 15 vehicle HP per use.
Vehicle Repair Device: restores 30 HP per use.
Universal Patch: restores 60 HP per use.

message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.place: Can only be placed within 2 blocks above white concrete markers
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_ammo: Universal firearm ammunition, consumed when firing.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_pisto: Right-click to fire (needs ammo). Fast cooldown, short range. Instantly kills monsters; deals 50 health damage to players (reduced by armor); finishes off downed players.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_hunti: Right-click to fire (needs ammo). Balanced range and cooldown. Instantly kills monsters; deals 50 health damage to players (reduced by armor); finishes off downed players.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_rifle: Right-click to fire (needs ammo). Long range, long cooldown. Instantly kills monsters; deals 50 health damage to players (reduced by armor); finishes off downed players.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_barbe: Barbed wire: a cheap spike trap - raiders stepping in are slowed and take light damage; crafted from wire and nails. Adventure-mode placement only on white concrete markers, reclaim with the wrench.
item.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_unlock_s: §7Right-click to use: Unlocks %1$s extra inventory slots
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.backp: Capacity %1$s/%2$s (right-click to open; backpacks/placeholders can't go inside)

tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_coin: 1 coin = 1 game token. Right-click to deposit the whole stack back into your own balance; hand it to teammates or trade it to other teams via visiting. Use the "Exchange Coins" button in the inventory to withdraw from your balance.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.coin_: Enter an amount (1 coin = 1 token); right-click coins to deposit

A lure is already placed tonight
An ominous scent drifts in... more raiders than usual tonight!
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_plast: Scavenged plastic sheets - raw material for hazmat suits and fuel cans.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_glass: Sharp broken glass, used for molotovs, goggles and solar panels.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_wire: Old wire that still conducts - basic material for electronics.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_gear: A greasy gear - the heart of machines like the chainsaw.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_fuel_: A full can of fuel: right-click the generator for 450s of power.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_cloth: A roll of clean cloth, made from 3 rags at the workbench.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_rope: Right-click to deploy a temporary climbable rope extending upward (gone after 30s). Also a common crafting material.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_grapp: Right-click to hook the block you're aiming at (within 24 blocks) and swing yourself over — no fall damage on landing. 20 durability, 15s cooldown; misses cost nothing.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.grapp: The hook didn't catch anything (range %1$s blocks)
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_chemi: A vial of dubious reagents - key ingredient for medicine and chemistry.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_elect: Circuit boards pulled from old appliances - needed for radios, goggles and solar panels.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_gunpo: Sealed gunpowder - filling for pipe bombs and flashbangs. Store carefully.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_canne: The doomsday classic: keeps forever, eat straight from the can.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_mre: Military ration - one pack lasts a day. The most filling food there is.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_biscu: Dry and hard but filling. Bring water.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_jerky: Smoked jerky - also an ingredient for lures.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_insta: The hardest currency of the apocalypse. Shame there's no hot water.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_energ: A hiker's favorite - small, filling, quick to eat.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_seeds: A small bag of wild vegetable seeds. Plant them in a planter box.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_water: Military water pouch - far more quenching than a bottle.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_juice: Expired but drinkable juice - quenches and fills a little.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_coffe: Bitter instant coffee - keeps you sharp and steady.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_sedat: Fast-acting calming agent - a lifeline when sanity runs low.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_antib: Proper anti-infection medicine - first choice when sick.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_paink: Common painkillers - quickly restore some health.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_purif: Military-grade tablets that flush out most pollution.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_charc: A cheap activated-charcoal pill that absorbs some pollution.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_detox: Warm herbal tea that flushes out pollution and calms the mind.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_purif: Filtered clean water: quenches thirst and rinses out pollution.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_vitam: Multivitamins - a small boost to everything.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_medki: A full first-aid kit: restores lots of health and cures sickness.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_adren: Emergency injection: 30 seconds of sprint-like speed.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_healt: Permanently raises max health. The body endures more damage.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_pollu: Permanently raises pollution cap. Resist more radiation and toxins.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_nutri: Permanently raises hunger and thirst caps. One dose, lifelong benefit.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_garde: §7A planter designed for berries, bamboo, cocoa beans and chorus flowers. Chorus flowers grow slowly but also yield chorus fruit on harvest.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_mushr: §7A mycelium planter. Grows red/brown mushrooms, warped/crimson fungus and nether wart. Plant 1, harvest 2. Warped/crimson fungus grow slowly, nether wart at moderate speed.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_advan: §7Advanced planter. Grows all basic crops (2-stage fast growth) plus hemp, torchflower and pitcher plant (full 3 stages).
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_arid_: §7Arid cultivator. Grows cactus only — plant 1, harvest 2.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_hydro: §7Hydroponic box. Grows sugar cane, kelp, medicinal fern and lily pads in water — plant 1, harvest 2.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_knife: A light melee weapon with a quick draw.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_sledg: Heavy but deadly - one swing nearly downs a person.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_chain: A triumph of engineering - the strongest melee weapon.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_fire_: A breaching tool that handles people and monsters alike.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_stun_: Non-lethal: low damage, but heavily slows the target for 3s.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_molot: Throw at the crosshair: ignites monsters in the area. Great for night watch.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_pipe_: A crude but potent bomb: devastates monsters and players in the blast.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_flash: Blinds players and slows monsters in the area. Good for raids and escapes.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_scrap: Leggings of bolted scrap - 6% health damage reduction.
Boots of bolted scrap - 5% health damage reduction.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_iron_: Solid iron leggings - 12% health damage reduction.
Solid iron boots - 10% health damage reduction.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_gas_m: While worn: immune to pollution rain and smog, plus 3% damage reduction.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_hazma: Full-body protection: pollution builds at half rate, plus 5% damage reduction.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_night: Automatic night vision while worn at night - essential for patrols.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_riot_: While held (either hand): incoming health damage ×0.75.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_radio: Right-click to listen: reports the current environmental event.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_compa: Right-click to point the way and distance back to your shelter.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_repai: Right-click your door with it: restores 50 door durability at once.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_rain_: An old barrel catching runoff from the eaves. Gathers 1 dirty water every 180s, holds up to 2; right-click to collect when the top turns blue. Purify before drinking.
A wide catchment funnel stretched from plastic sheeting. Gathers 1 dirty water every 120s, holds up to 4; right-click to collect. Purify before drinking.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_conde: A steel machine that pulls water out of thin air (crafting requires power). Gathers 1 dirty water every 80s, holds up to 6; right-click to collect. Purify before drinking.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.kill_: The weight of a life taken settles on your mind — max sanity permanently -%s (now capped at %s).
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.minig: The panel has no power — fuel your generator (scrap/coal) first.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_frag_: Nails and gunpowder packed into an iron shell, old-school style. Throw to detonate: heavy damage to mobs in range, players lose 35 health. No fire, no blinding — pure fragmentation.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_therm: A stainless thermos that still holds the heat. Drink: thirst +40, sanity +3 — on a cold night, a mouthful of hot water is half a life.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_stew: Vegetables, meat and everything else you could find, stewed into one can. Eat: hunger +35, thirst +10, sanity +5. The closest thing to home cooking the apocalypse has to offer.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_steel: A steel ingot reforged from scrap iron; the core material for metallurgy and fortification.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_nails: A handful of nails, the basic consumable for reinforcing works and building furniture.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_ferti: Fertilizer fermented from rotten flesh, used to grow vegetables.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_charc: An activated-charcoal filter, a key part of purification and protective gear.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_dried: Sun-dried fruit, light and long-keeping, a quick bite to top up hunger.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_trail: A mix of nuts and dried fruit; a high-calorie marching ration.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_fresh: Home-grown fresh vegetables, also the base for soups and teas.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_canne: Steaming soup that restores both hunger and thirst.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_sport: A sports drink: quenches a lot of thirst, briefly boosts speed and steadies sanity.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_herba: Calming herbal tea that restores sanity, quenches thirst and cures sickness.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_blood: An emergency transfusion bag that greatly restores health.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_anti_: Anti-pollution serum that clears a lot of pollution and cures sickness.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_hatch: A light hatchet that swings fast, dealing 25 health damage in melee.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_cleav: A heavy cleaver dealing 35 health damage in melee.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_steel: Steel spear: slightly less damage than the steel sword, but hits briefly slow the target - a polearm for kiting with traps and barricades.
A sharp steel sword, a metallurgy masterpiece, dealing 55 health damage in melee.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_incen: Thrown at your crosshair: a wide blaze that burns raiders and damages players in range.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_steel: A steel helmet reducing health damage by 18%.
A steel chestplate reducing health damage by 18%.
Steel leggings reducing health damage by 15%.
Steel boots reducing health damage by 12%.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_balli: A ballistic vest reducing health damage by 25% in a single piece (chest slot).
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_reinf: A steel-reinforced barricade with 220 durability; raiders strike it first.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_flood: A floodlight that gives max light level 15 while powered, dispelling darkness and whisperers.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_solar: Right-click the generator in daytime for 1080s of power (= Large Battery ×3); useless at night.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_alarm: Right-click to arm: tonight's door raiders -1 (once per night).
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_lure: Right-click to place: half of tonight's raiders are drawn to a random other team (once per night).
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_toolb: Right-click to open: get 3 random materials/tools.

info.screen.roleid.wizard:
Wizard (Killer team)
Starts with a [Staff] and a [Potion]. ALL of your coin income (kills and natural regen) converts into [Mana], shown as a bossbar; you no longer use coins.
Staff: right-click to charge a magic fire arrow that pierces up to 2 players and kills instantly on hit; left-click to knock back.
Potion: on use, goes on cooldown, grants a large amount of mana, and makes you immune to one lethal attack for the next 60 seconds.
Magic pool: Sneak + ability key to switch spells, ability key to cast the current spell:
· Armor: spend mana, open your inventory and click a player's avatar to grant them a shield (the shield lasts only 30 seconds).
· Frost Shock: spend mana to root all nearby players (except you), blocking movement and view rotation.
· Shroud Shadow: blind all non-killer players for 6s; during a blackout it drains extra mana to last until the blackout ends.
· Explosion!: spend mana to arm; your next staff cast releases a wall-piercing nine-ring fireball (acts like a grenade).
shop.noellesroles.wizard.frost.desc: Spend half of your current mana (needs ≥200) to freeze all players within 8 blocks for 4s.
shop.noellesroles.wizard.shadow.desc: Spend 150 mana. Blackout only: extend darkness and blindness of all passengers by 6s.
shop.noellesroles.wizard.explosion.desc: Spend 85% of your current mana (needs ≥400) to arm the nine-ring fireball; the next staff cast detonates it.
shop.noellesroles.wizard.blink.desc: Spend 80 mana to blink up to 8 blocks along your view, stopping early at walls.

cinematic.sre.sixty_seconds.title: Reborn: My 60 Seconds on the Harbi Train
cinematic.sre.sixty_seconds.m1: Long ago, this world had ordinary dusks too.
cinematic.sre.sixty_seconds.s1: Chimney smoke, people heading home, lit windows.
cinematic.sre.sixty_seconds.m2b: The sky lit with a light that should not be.
cinematic.sre.sixty_seconds.s2: A meteor, falling straight toward us.
cinematic.sre.sixty_seconds.s3a: The broadcast had only one last line --
cinematic.sre.sixty_seconds.s4b: The rest of us, only two each.
cinematic.sre.sixty_seconds.m4: Only hunger and thirst, gnawing at the will, day and night.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.deven: ═══ Daily Event · Day %s ═══
Misfortune
Fortune
Dilemma
Trade
Expedition
Raid
Any family member may click an option; the whole team shares the consequences. If no one decides within %ss, the cautious option is taken.
Click to choose
You hesitated too long, and the moment slipped away...
That decision has already passed.
You are in no state to make decisions.
%s decided for the family: %s
It's pitch black in there — you need a flashlight in your inventory.
Not enough coins (need %s).
You have no food on you.
nothing
(There was nothing left at home to lose...)
Failed: unknown event id, or you are not on any team.
Rat Infestation
Scratching noises all night long. Come morning, a nest of rats bolts out of the pantry through a gnawed-open bag.
The rats ruined your stores: lost %s. The teeth marks give everyone the creeps — team sanity -5.
Burst Pipe
A dull thud inside the wall — the rusted pipe finally split, and murky water floods the floor.
Repairs ate the whole morning: lost %s, team thirst -10.
Shared Nightmare
The same dream: sirens, a collapsing sky, legs that won't run. Everyone wakes soaked in cold sweat.
No one dares to speak first. Team sanity -10.
Night Thief
The lock is intact, but a window hangs ajar. A trail of muddy footprints leads straight to the storage.
After taking stock, you're missing: %s.
Spoiled Food
A sour stench drifts from the corner of the pantry — some expiry dates don't grant extensions, even in the apocalypse.
%s only noticed after a bite — hunger -15; the ruined %s had to be thrown out.
Ash Storm
The sky looks dusted with cement. Fine ash creeps in through the door cracks, stinging every eye.
Team pollution +8, sanity -3.
Rotting Doorframe
The hinges let out a dying groan this morning, and wood dust trickles from the doorframe.
Front door durability -20. Best reinforce it before nightfall.
Radio Static
The radio switched itself on. Buried in the static is something looping — almost a voice, but not quite.
Nobody will admit what they heard. Team sanity -6.
Sudden Illness
A morning cough cuts through the shelter. One touch of the forehead — burning hot.
%s has fallen ill. Find medicine — this only gets worse with time.
Thankfully just a chill. Everyone's still holding up.
Generator Short
A muffled bang, then the smell of burnt insulation. Sparks crackle along the wiring as the lights die.
Power is out. The generator needs fuel again.
Hidden Wall Stash
Moving the cabinet knocked loose a baseboard — behind it, a little stash left by the previous owner.
Gained: %s.
Kind Stranger
A cardboard box sits at the door with a note on top: "Hold on." No signature. The footprints vanish around the corner.
Gained: %s. The world isn't completely broken yet.
Clean Rain
It's raining — and tests say this one is actually clean. Every container you own is lined up under the eaves.
Team thirst +15.
Sweet Dream
A dream of the summer before the end: iced soda, an evening breeze, a sky without sirens.
The pillows are damp on waking, but hearts feel lighter. Team sanity +10.
Military Broadcast
A clear voice cuts through the static: "...rescue operations are ongoing, hold your position..." then it's gone.
Someone out there is still fighting. Team sanity +8.
Government Airdrop
Engines roar on the horizon — a crate under a parachute is drifting toward the search zone!
The airdrop is coming down and its coordinates were broadcast — first come, first served.
Sadly today's drop was already claimed; you only watched from afar. Team sanity +5.
Stray Cat
A cat, thin as a shadow, sits at your door beside the "gift" it dragged over, and meows once.
Gained: %s. It rubs against a leg and strolls off. Team sanity +5.
Knock at Dawn
Knock. Knock. Knock. Barely light out, and someone is at the door. Through the crack: only a blurred silhouette.
Open the door
Pretend no one's home
A weary traveler, trading supplies for half a night under a roof: gained %s. Team sanity +5.
The moment the door opens, they shove in swinging a club! In the chaos you lose %s. Team sanity -8.
The knocking goes on for a long time before it stops. Nobody can settle down all morning. Team sanity -3.
Begging Survivor
A survivor kneels at your door clutching an empty can, lips cracked: "Please... just one bite."
Give them some food
Turn them away
Their hands shake the whole time you hand over %s. You did the right thing. Team sanity +10.
They leave without looking back. That silhouette lingers in everyone's mind. Team sanity -5.
Radio Lottery
A pirate station is running a prize quiz, the host screaming: "Stake 30 coins, triple it if you're right — even the apocalypse needs dreams!"
Stake 30 coins
Turn off the radio
%s guessed right! The station's runner actually delivered 90 coins.
%s guessed wrong. 30 coins down the drain, sanity -3.
You switch the radio off. If the apocalypse has a surplus of anything, it's scams.
Suspicious Can
An unlabeled can rolls out from the back of the pantry. It rattles when shaken, and the date stamp is gibberish.
Open it and eat
Throw it away
Surprisingly... delicious? %s eats their fill, hunger +30.
Half an hour after swallowing, %s turns as green as the can — they're sick.
The can goes into the trash. Some mysteries are better left unopened.
Trading Caravan
An armed caravan rests outside. The woman in charge raps on the wagon: "Hard currency for supplies. Interested?"
Buy a supply pack for 60 coins
Send the caravan away
Cash on delivery: gained %s.
The caravan rolls off in a cloud of dust. They may not come this way again.
Barter
An old man with a medicine chest hesitates at your door: "These old bones just need something to eat... medicine, I've got plenty."
Trade one food item for medicine
Politely decline
Traded %s for %s. The old man leaves with endless thanks.
The old man sighs and hobbles away.
Hidden Cellar
On patrol you find a loose plank in the backyard — beneath it, steps descending into darkness. Looks like an abandoned private cellar.
Take a flashlight and explore
Nail the plank shut
%s clicks on a flashlight and slips down into the cellar...
%s is back! The cellar yielded: %s. (Pollution +10)
A missed step on the way down — %s got hurt (health -20).
Caution wins. The plank is nailed back down, as if it was never found.
Collapsed Tunnel
The end of the street has caved in, exposing a pre-war tunnel. Wind pours out of the opening, thick with rust and mildew.
Take a flashlight into the tunnel
Steer clear of it
%s tightens their laces and vanishes into the dark of the tunnel mouth...
%s returns loaded down! Deep in the tunnel they dug up: %s. (Pollution +15)
A section of ceiling gave way — %s was struck (health -30).
Too much mold dust down there — %s has fallen ill.
That opening haunts the edge of everyone's dreams, but nobody goes near it again.
Desperate Measures
The dread of empty shelves spreads through the room. Someone whispers: the neighbors' stores... look plentiful.
Do it — raid the neighbors
Bury the thought
It worked: you made off with %s. But nobody can meet each other's eyes. Team sanity -15.
You turned the place over and found nothing worth taking — only guilt to carry home. Team sanity drops.
A deep breath, and the thought is pushed back down. Holding the line doesn't feel bad at all. Team sanity +3.
Your home was ransacked! Lost: %s. (Team sanity -5)
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_poker: A deck with frayed edges. Right-click to deal a round, restoring +8 sanity to everyone within 8 blocks. Cards wear out eventually (durability 15).
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_chess: The board survived, and so did your opponent. Right-click to play a match, restoring +10 sanity to everyone within 8 blocks. Pieces go missing one by one (durability 20).
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_harmo: A little melody that fits in a pocket. Right-click to play, restoring +6 sanity to everyone within 8 blocks. Built to last (durability 30).
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_guita: A wooden guitar missing a string. Right-click to strum and sing, restoring +12 sanity to everyone within 8 blocks. Few strings remain (durability 12).
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_teddy: A well-hugged teddy bear with one loose button eye. Right-click to pass the warmth around, restoring +15 sanity to everyone within 8 blocks. It's fragile (durability 8).
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.enter: %s dealt a round of cards, sanity +%s
%s passed the teddy bear over, sanity +%s
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.deven: Bed Bug Outbreak
The mattress seams are crawling with tiny black dots. Last night's itching finally has an explanation.
All the bedding gets dragged out to bake in the sun, but the crawling feeling stays. Team sanity -8.
Threatening Graffiti
A huge red X has been painted across your door, the paint still wet. Fresh pry marks scar the frame.
Someone has marked this place. Team sanity -7, door durability -10.
Raccoon Break-in
Rustling in the vents — a raccoon saunters off with its loot, leaving a trail of wreckage behind.
Tallying the damage: lost %s.
Contaminated Water
The water comes out with a suspicious rainbow sheen. By the time anyone notices, breakfast was already cooked with it.
Team pollution +10; the tainted %s had to be poured out.
Rusted Tools
Damp crept along the floor into the toolbox. One of the tools comes out as a lump of rust.
Lost: %s.
Old Records
A stack of vinyl at the bottom of an attic box — and the turntable still spins. Tonight, there is music.
One old song after another; someone starts humming along. Team sanity +12.
Recreation Aid Box
An old relief-organization crate, its label reading: "Food for the spirit matters too."
Gained: %s. Even the apocalypse needs a little fun.
Scrap Pile
The half-collapsed garage next door has split open, and the junk heap inside hasn't been picked over yet.
Gained: %s.
Relief Fund
The radio reads out your district number: survivor relief funds have been deposited to registered accounts.
30 coins credited to each member. Money is still money, even now.
Wounded Hound
A hound with an injured hind leg lies at your door, tail sweeping the ground softly, eyes wet.
Feed it some food
Shoo it away
It licks the %s clean and stands guard by the door all day. Everyone sleeps easier with it around. Team sanity +8.
It limps away around the corner. Nobody brings it up again. Team sanity -2.
Mysterious Merchant
A cloaked merchant produces a bulging cloth bag: "40 coins, no regrets — what's inside is up to fate."
Gamble 40 coins
Refuse
You open it up — actually good stuff: gained %s!
The bag holds a single rag. %s is speechless with rage, sanity -5.
The merchant shrugs, swirls their cloak, and is gone.
Arms Dealer
An armored pickup idles at the corner, a crate in the bed cracked open: "All the ammo you want. Cash only."
Buy stock for 50 coins
Wave them off
Cash for goods: gained %s.
The pickup revs off. In years this loud, he'll never lack for business.
Rooftop Water Tower
The old water tower across the street looks intact, and the lock on its maintenance ladder rusted off long ago. There might still be water inside.
Take a flashlight and climb up
Too exposed — forget it
%s switches on a flashlight and climbs the maintenance ladder into the tower...
%s is back! The tower yielded: %s. (Pollution +5)
A rusted rung snapped on the way down — %s took a fall (health -15).
Climbing that high in daylight really is asking for attention. The idea is dropped.
Power Siphon
While checking the lines you notice the neighbors' cable runs right under your wall. The toolbox happens to have pliers and tape.
Splice in and steal their power
Put the pliers away
Splice taped, meter spinning backwards — your power is extended by 90 seconds, and the neighbors go dark. Guilty consciences all around: team sanity -10.
After all that work, the cable turns out to be long dead. All that worry for nothing — team sanity -5.
Forget it. Power is precious in the apocalypse — so is a clear conscience. Team sanity +2.
Someone spliced into your power line! Electricity cut.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.knock: This door doesn't belong to any family.
Knock. Knock. Knock. — Someone is at your door.
Click, then type what you want to say through the door
Only creative-mode NPC players can speak this way.
Knock on a shelter door first (right-click it).
Your words carried through the door (%s heard).
Doomsday Daily · Day %s edition has arrived — click to read
Open today's newspaper
No newspaper yet today.
Doomsday Daily · Day %s
Survivor Press
── Past Headlines ──
Day %s: %s
The military has set up a temporary supply line under the ruined northern overpass; one ration per registered household.
The water plant is partially back online, but engineers warn: water at the end of the pipes still needs boiling or purification.
Weather observers say the ash clouds over the city won't clear for at least a week. Take precautions outdoors.
Multiple survivors report hearing 'whispers' at night. Experts advise: keep your home lit, and never walk into the dark alone.
Black-market coin rates keep soaring — a single bullet now costs what a dinner did before the fall.
The Neighborhood Mutual Aid Society is recruiting volunteers. Their only slogan: 'No one spends the night alone.'
A convoy from the south has reached the outskirts carrying medicine and vaccines; distribution points are yet to be announced.
Broadcast tower repairs are 60% complete. The crew says: 'Give us a few more days, and the whole city will hear voices again.'
Roving looter gangs have pried open several doors recently. Residents are urged to reinforce doors and windows and stay alert at night.
Stray animal numbers are surging. The shelter director says: 'They're survivors too.'
Witnesses saw a rescue helicopter circle downtown twice before leaving. Officials have not responded.
Signs of activity in the old-town tunnels: fresh footprints and a recently doused fire found near the entrance.
Seen by this paper: someone traded a guitar for three cans of food. In the apocalypse, morale is appreciating fast.
Health officials warn again: rainwater must not be drunk unpurified — multiple poisoning cases already reported.
The missing-persons board is covered in fresh notices again; volunteers sort and update them every day.
Rooftop gardens are quietly spreading across the blocks — seeds have become the hottest barter item.
In a corner of the ruins, an old barber still gives his neighbors free haircuts every week: 'Living with dignity matters.'
The radio request show returns tonight; the hotline jammed within ten minutes. The first song goes out 'to everyone still on the road.'
A fire broke out in the southern district last night, smoke covering half a block — likely an unattended heating flame.
Official notice: rescue operations are ongoing. Conserve supplies, look after each other, and hold on.
The city water system has completely failed. Only three underground wells remain accessible, now guarded by the military.
Abandoned supermarkets have been stripped bare. Survivors are now searching wall cavities and ceiling gaps for hidden caches.
Reports say mutated fish have appeared in the reservoir. The meat is inedible, but bones can be ground into bone-meal fertilizer.
Tires have become hard currency — intact car tires can be made into improvised armor or slings.
Books from the library are being burned for fuel. An old man wept: 'We are burning our own memories.'
Underground fuel tanks were dug up at an abandoned gas station, but evaporation means less than 20% is usable.
A survivor found a stash of canned goods in a basement — produced five years ago. Are they still edible?
A local hunter shares his experience: mutated rabbit meat tastes sour, but the pelts make good thermal linings.
A chemistry teacher set up a makeshift soap workshop in the ruins, trading animal fat and ash for food.
Edible fungi colonies have been found in the sewers, but experts are needed to identify the toxic varieties.
A battery collection drive has begun — trade ten used batteries for one candle. Light is becoming precious.
Surgical instruments from the abandoned hospital have been sterilized and redistributed. A doctor set up a temporary operating table in the parking lot.
Farming experts advise: lay tarps on rooftops to catch rainwater and use drip irrigation — it can feed an entire squad.
A suburban beekeeper's hives miraculously survived. Honey has become a high-energy food and natural preservative.
Fuel shortages are critical. Residents are advised to use electricity only during the two coldest hours of the night.
Railway gravel has been repurposed into makeshift water filters, improving purification efficiency by 30%.
A team found an intact 3D printer in the rubble, but without filament — it's just scrap metal.
At the barter market, a roll of medical gauze now costs three bullets — getting injured is becoming a luxury.
Tests show the local soil has heavy metal contamination. Homegrown vegetables must be tested before eating.
Solar panels are fetching astronomical prices on the black market, but many say: 'Better expensive than frozen to death.'
A mother reads her missing child's name over the radio every day. Her voice grows hoarser — but she never stops.
The former city hall has been turned into a collective shelter housing nearly 200 people, with mattresses crowding every hallway.
Someone painted a giant sunflower on a ruined wall, with the words: 'Remember what sunshine looked like.'
A weekend flea market has sprung up in the central plaza. Barter only — no currency, no rules.
The old postman still delivers letters on foot every day, though most recipients are long gone. 'It's my route,' he says.
An elementary school teacher runs a 'classroom' in a basement, teaching children to write with charcoal on concrete.
The community has established a 'Night Watch' rotation — patrolling every night against thieves and monster attacks.
A retired chef makes a daily soup from scavenged ingredients and gives it away free to passing wanderers.
The city's last printing press is still running, producing a handwritten weekly newsletter for the price of one loaf of bread.
Children have formed 'Scavenger Squads', squeezing into cracks too small for adults to find supplies.
Young people held a concert in the ruins, using instruments made from scrap metal and plastic buckets.
Someone proposed restoring the 'Apocalypse Currency' backed by bottled water. Debate raged — but nobody followed through.
The Survivor Alliance formed an 'Ethics Committee' to handle supply disputes — though nobody truly obeys it.
A couple was married in the ruined chapel. The officiant said: 'In this world, love is the rarest supply.'
Pet cats and dogs are being retrained as 'sentries' — they can sense approaching monsters before humans can.
Elders have organized a 'Memory Preservation Group', teaching youth to identify wild edibles and read weather signs.
A psychologist set up a free 'Listening Corner'. People line up — just for someone to hear them speak.
Someone built a small library in an apartment building with 47 books. Most popular: 'Wilderness Survival Guide'.
A deaf survivor teaches basic distress signals in sign language — voices may fade, but gestures endure.
The basketball court has been converted into a community garden — potatoes and cabbage grow between the three-point line.
Gunshots were heard in the east district — reportedly two teams clashed over control of a water well.
Strange lights were seen moving through the ruins at night. Those who followed them never returned. Do not be curious.
A group in white hazmat suits has been seen in the southern district. They speak to no one.
A survivor claims to have heard rhythmic tapping deep in the mines — like some kind of signal.
The sewer system has been taken over by unknown creatures. Several explorers escaped wounded.
A new wave of refugees has arrived from outside the city. According to them: 'The east has completely fallen.'
A water tank poisoning incident has sparked panic. Teams are now taking shifts guarding water sources.
An arms cache was discovered in an underground bunker, but tripwire traps cost the first explorers dearly.
An organization has started openly demanding 'protection fees', claiming to offer safe zones — nobody knows who's behind them.
Police remnants have declared a 'Provisional Security Force', but they are severely short on weapons and manpower.
A jamming signal has appeared on comm channels. Someone is repeating the same Morse code: 'Do not trust the broadcast.'
Every resident of an apartment building vanished overnight. The doors were locked from the inside. An investigation team is en route.
Mass livestock deaths reported at a suburban farm. Disease has been preliminarily ruled out. Cause unknown.
A team reported encountering 'uniformed attackers' while scavenging — well-equipped and merciless.
The old hospital morgue has been disturbed. Some bodies are missing.
An eerie green aurora appeared on the horizon last night and lasted for hours. Even the weather station has no explanation.
Multiple independent water sources now smell of oil. Suspicions point to ruptured underground pipelines.
An abandoned factory suddenly lit up late at night, then fell silent again by dawn.
Robbery gangs are using increasingly professional tactics — suspected involvement of former military or police personnel.
Alert level raised: multiple monitoring stations report increasing underground seismic activity.
A team discovered an uncontaminated spring in the mountains and is planning a pipeline into the city.
A high school student built a wind turbine from scratch, successfully powering the common areas of an entire building.
Flowers with blue petals have appeared in the wild — the elders say they've never seen this variety before the catastrophe.
The communications team has made contact with survivors in a neighboring city. Both sides plan to establish a trade route.
A survivor found an intact box of chocolates in the ruins — he's saving them to share with all the children on the winter solstice.
Weather station reports: air quality index has been 'Good' for three consecutive days — the first time since the disaster.
All animals have escaped from the abandoned zoo. Wolves and deer have been seen running together on the outskirts.
Some teenagers pieced together a working car from scrap parts — top speed 20 km/h, but it runs.
An underground cavern has been converted into a natural cold storage — stable at 4°C, perfect for long-term food storage.
An elderly herbalist has successfully treated multiple infected patients — the apocalypse's 'barefoot doctor' has returned.
The radio station launched a 'Letter to a Stranger' campaign and received over a hundred replies.
Someone built a tiny chapel from broken glass shards — when sunlight passes through, the floor glows with color.
Astronomy enthusiasts have noticed the night sky is clearer than before the disaster — no more light pollution.
A group of music teachers found an intact piano in the ruins. After tuning, they now hold open-air recitals every Saturday night.
An expedition team found a complete weather radar station at an old military base. After repairs, it may be functional again.
Rumors say the government is building a 'New District' somewhere outside the city, but there is no official confirmation.
The first babies born after the disaster are growing healthy. People say: 'New life means new hope.'
Geothermal resources have been discovered underground. An engineering team plans to lay heating pipes to keep the shelters warm.
Several teams have jointly established a 'Seed Bank', collecting and preserving every plantable seed variety they can find.
A faint signal was received from overseas today — it seems the world hasn't gone completely silent after all.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_showe: A shower head cobbled together from scrap and plastic — the water pressure is tragic, but it beats nothing. Right-click to shower: consumes 1 small water bottle from your inventory, pollution -50%. Once per person per day — hot water is precious in the apocalypse.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_plant: A wooden box full of soil — the shelter's little patch of farmland. Right-click with vegetable seeds to plant; matures in about 4 minutes. Right-click with fertilizer to advance a growth stage instantly. When ripe, right-click to harvest 2-3 fresh vegetables, with a chance of seeds back.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.showe: You already showered today — save some water.
You need 1 small water bottle in your inventory.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.plant: You need to hold vegetable seeds to plant.
The seeds are in the soil. Now let them grow.
Growing (%s/%s)... fertilizer can speed it up.
The fertilizer works — look at it go!
Harvested %s fresh vegetables — and saved a pack of seeds!
screen.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.airdro: Empty — click items from inventory on the right to add
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.claw_: §7No target hooked (range %s blocks, needs line of sight)
§cYou were yanked over by %s's claw hook!
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_npc_t: Admin map-building tool. Right-click a registered spawn point to cycle its merchant stock profile; sneak right-click to bump the garrison radius by 2 (wraps at 24). Changes save immediately and refresh the preview.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_ancho: Admin map-building tool. Right-click the door inside the shelter template to register it as the anchor; right-click a search-zone exit door to preview that team's shelter placement and check for overlap; sneak right-click a door to clear the anchor. Pairs with /sre:60s shelter_at_door.
tooltip.noellesroles.sixty_seconds_npc_p: Admin map tool. Sneak+right-click air to cycle NPC type; right-click a block to register a spawn point (saved immediately); sneak+right-click a block to delete a nearby spawn point.
gui.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.actio: Pay %1$s tokens to fight alongside you for a while
Can't hire (needs %1$s tokens, or already hired)
%1$s%% chance. Success goes unnoticed, but your sanity pays for it
Take it by force: guaranteed loot, guaranteed enemy, same sanity cost
Creative: configure this merchant's goods and prices
Click to buy; sneak+click buys %1$s at once
screen.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.sh: No goods in this profile — click an inventory item to add
Click an item to add it to this profile
Select a row to edit its price / stock / restock
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.m: He's too busy running for his life to trade.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.r: He glares at you. No chance he's talking.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.h: %1$s's contract ran out and he returned to his post.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.s: That was a rotten thing to do: sanity -%1$s, max sanity permanently -%2$s (now %3$s).
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.r: Deleted the spawn point at %1$s %2$s %3$s (%4$s left)
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.p: No registered NPC spawn point nearby.
A sail on the horizon... pirates!
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.b: §4⚠ Alert: A bandit has slipped into the shelter!
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.l: No NPC spawn points registered yet.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.b: No spawn point #%1$s (use /sre:60s npc list to see the indices).
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.p: Placed %1$s preview marker(s) (/sre:60s npc hide to clear).
Dropped a pirate boat on the water nearby.
No room for a pirate boat here (you need deep open water).
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.ancho: Shelter anchor door cleared: shelters fall back to the team grid.
Register the shelter template first: /sre:60s_area template shelter <x1 y1 z1> <x2 y2 z2>
Note: shelter_at_door is currently OFF, so the anchor won't apply (/sre:60s shelter_at_door on).
Now right-click a search-zone exit door to preview the placement. %1$s exit door(s) bound so far.
Right-click the door inside the shelter template first to set the anchor.
This door has no search zone bound to it yet, so it isn't an exit door.
This exit door belongs to team #%1$s
Warning: overlaps team #%1$s's shelter! Move these exit doors further apart.
Placement is clear — no overlap with other teams.
Shelter anchor door: %1$s | shelter_at_door: %2$s | exit doors bound: %3$s
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.t: In times like these, trading anything for anything is a blessing.
Prices change daily. Don't blame me, blame the world.
Everything here was dug out of a corpse pile. It's worth the price.
Don't just stand there gawking. Buying or not?
The chain of command is long gone. The rifle isn't.
Don't start anything. I'd rather not either.
Pay enough and I'll hold the line for you a while.
I've seen plenty of heroes. Grass is waist-high on their graves.
I'm just passing through. I didn't see anything.
You're looking for a way to live too? Then we're the same, at least.
This is everything I've got on me. Really.
I need to find somewhere to hide before dark.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.npc.i: Don't open the door at night. Don't trust any sound.
The further out you go, the better the loot and the shorter your life.
They say someone called in a rescue with a beacon. Who knows if it's true.
The big ones barely feel bullets. You'll need more than a few.
Boil dirty water, or it'll empty you out.
Bandits come with the horde at night. They go for the thin doors.
Sanity — lose all of it and you stop being a person.
Reinforce your door. Beats any lucky charm.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_p: §eTip: §7The purification station turns polluted water into drinkable water.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_c: §eTip: §7Compost bins turn rotten food into fertilizer to speed up crop growth.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_b: §eTip: §7Bandages restore a little health. First-aid kits are better. Treat wounds promptly.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_s: §eTip: §7Low sanity causes negative effects. Entertainment items like harmonicas can restore sanity.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_g: §eTip: §7Generators need fuel cans to run. Combine with solar panels to charge batteries.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_c: §eTip: §7The workbench crafts tools and weapons. Upgrade its level as a priority.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_s: §eTip: §7Spike traps damage monsters that step on them — a solid defense tool.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_t: §eTip: §7Teammates share tech tree progress. Coordinated division of labor is more efficient.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_m: §eTip: §7Monsters are more active at night. Whisperers fear light — a flashlight is your best friend.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_t: §eTip: §7When visiting other teams, face-to-face trading is possible. Mutual benefit beats mutual plunder.
§eTip: §7The tech tree uses scrap to unlock advanced recipes. Prioritize basic survival tech first.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_p: §eTip: §7Right-click crops in the planter with fertilizer to speed up their growth.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_a: §eTip: §7Airdrop supplies usually land near team shelters. Collect them promptly.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.tip_h: §eTip: §7Survivors can purchase special seeds from the shopping hotline.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.event: Sandstorm
A sandstorm sweeps through the city! Visibility drops sharply outdoors!
The sandstorm has passed. Visibility is finally clear again.
Earthquake
EARTHQUAKE!! The ground is shaking violently!
The earthquake has stopped. The ground is still again.
Meteor Shower
Fireballs rain from the sky! The outdoors is extremely dangerous — take cover indoors!
The meteor shower has ended. The sky is calm once more.
§cYou've been hit by a meteor fragment!
Spore Fog
Deadly spore fog envelops the streets! Nausea and sanity drain outdoors!
The spore fog has cleared. The air is breathable again.
Hail
Fist-sized hailstones fall from the sky! You'll get hurt outdoors!
The hail has stopped. The ground is covered in shattered ice.
Blood Moon
The moon turns blood red — monsters grow more ferocious!
The blood moon has finally set. The first light of dawn brings a brief peace.
Radiation Leak
Radiation levels are spiking sharply! Pollution slowly increases for everyone!
Radiation levels have returned to normal. Alert cleared.
Dense Fog
A dense fog swallows the entire city! Visibility is near zero!
The dense fog slowly lifts. The city's outline reappears.
━━ Neighborhood Gossip ━━
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.zone_: Order still holds. Major routes are patrolled. Going out is relatively safe.
Security continues to decay. Night travel risk has increased sharply. Stick together.
Many blocks have become no-man's-land. Wild vegetation is covering the roads.
The city ecosystem is rebuilding. New flora and fauna have appeared in some areas.
Due to the ongoing disaster weather, casualty reports are suspended. Prioritize your own safety.
The death toll is staggering. Multiple shelters are operating beyond capacity.
message.noellesroles.sixty_seconds.gossi: Rumor has it a team captain cooked something unidentifiable last night. The entire team spent the night running to the bathroom.
Someone found a diary in the ruins, filled with the same name over and over — a regret whose story we'll never know.
Two teams argued all day over a chicken. The chicken eventually ended up in a third team's pot.
Street rumor: someone traded a pack of cigarettes for a shotgun. Nobody knows who got the better deal.
Someone was spotted last night walking the streets in pajamas, carrying a frying pan.
A team's rooftop garden was stripped bare by birds. They're now training a cat to stand guard.
A guy found a crate of instant noodles while scavenging — two years past expiration. He ate them anyway.
Someone built a snowman in the middle of the plaza. Its scarf reads: 'Don't give up.'
A team invented a new dish: roasted cockroach skewers. Reportedly 'crunchy, tastes like chicken.'
The city's cats have started gathering around a specific warehouse. Someone suspects there's something good inside.
Two kids bet on who could climb the tallest ruin. They both got stuck and had to be rescued by adults.
Someone used a generator to play an old movie in the abandoned theater. Over fifty people showed up — better attendance than before the disaster.
message.noellesroles.hotline.already_dia: You've already dialed this number today.

message.noellesroles.hotline.invalid_num: §cThe number you dialed is not in service.
message.noellesroles.hotline.express.gre: §6[Express Hotline] §eHello, this is the Doomsday Express Delivery. Do you want to send supplies? You'll need to provide your own package.
message.noellesroles.hotline.express.bye: §6[Express Hotline] §eAlright, call again if you need.
message.noellesroles.hotline.express.sel: §6[Express Hotline] §eWhich team do you want to send to?
message.noellesroles.hotline.express.ins: §6[Express Hotline] §ePut the supplies into an express package and place it in your mailbox. The courier will pick it up tomorrow morning. Delivery takes one day.
message.noellesroles.hotline.express.pac: §eDon't forget to put the express package in your mailbox!
message.noellesroles.hotline.shop.greeti: §6[Shop Hotline] §eWelcome to the Doomsday Mall! What would you like to buy today?
message.noellesroles.hotline.shop.title: §eToday's Hot Deals:
message.noellesroles.hotline.shop.confir: §aOrder confirmed! Please place enough coins in your mailbox.
message.noellesroles.hotline.shop.put_co: §eThe courier will deliver tomorrow morning and collect the payment from your mailbox.
message.noellesroles.hotline.shop.insuff: §cNot enough coins in your mailbox. The courier left with the goods.
message.noellesroles.hotline.rescue.gree: §6[Rescue Hotline] §eThis is the Rescue Center. How can we help?
message.noellesroles.hotline.rescue.bye: §6[Rescue Hotline] §eAlright, rescue supplies will arrive tomorrow. Please check your mailbox.
message.noellesroles.hotline.rescue.arri: §aRescue supplies have been delivered to your mailbox!
message.noellesroles.hotline.rescue.no_n: §7[Rescue Hotline] After assessment, your team is in decent shape. No emergency support needed for now.
message.noellesroles.hotline.intel.greet: §6[Intel Hotline] §eHello, this is the Intelligence Center. Here's the current situation:
message.noellesroles.hotline.weather.gre: §6[Weather Forecast] §eThis is the weather station. 3-day forecast:
message.noellesroles.hotline.counsel.gre: §6[Counseling] §eHello, someone is here to listen. Take a deep breath. Take your time.
message.noellesroles.hotline.counsel.alr: §cYou've already had counseling today. Come back tomorrow.
message.noellesroles.hotline.hire.greeti: §6[Hire Hotline] §eA guard is dispatched to assist you. Put 8 coins in your mailbox. Tomorrow: door +15 durability and a random weapon.
message.noellesroles.hotline.hire.bye: §6[Hire Hotline] §eAlright, call again if you need us.
message.noellesroles.hotline.hire.confir: §aHire confirmed! The guard will repair your door and deliver supplies tomorrow.
message.noellesroles.hotline.black_marke: §5[Black Market] §eShh... keep it down. Want a random pack of 'special supplies'? Put 8 coins in your mailbox, arrives tomorrow.
§5[Black Market] §eSuit yourself. Remember — you never made this call.
§aDeal complete. The goods will 'appear' in your mailbox tomorrow.
§cNot enough coins. The black market doesn't do credit.
message.noellesroles.hotline.recycle.gre: §6[Recycle Hotline] §eHello, we recycle all reusable scrap. Put scrap in your mailbox, 6 scrap = 1 coin, settled tomorrow.
message.noellesroles.hotline.recycle.con: §aRecycle confirmed! Tomorrow %s scrap → %s coins will be placed in your mailbox.
message.noellesroles.hotline.recycle.not: §7No recyclable scrap found in your mailbox (need at least 3).
message.noellesroles.hotline.recycle.no_: §cYou don't have a mailbox placed. Cannot recycle.
message.noellesroles.hotline.poverty_rel: §6[Poverty Relief] §eHello, this is the Doomsday Relief Center. We'll do our best to help everyone in need.
§aApplication accepted. 5 coins of relief funds will be placed in your mailbox tomorrow — hang in there.
message.noellesroles.hotline.report.gree: §6[Anonymous Report] §eThank you for contributing to community safety.
message.noellesroles.hotline.report.rewa: §aReport filed. 3 coin bounty will be placed in your mailbox tomorrow — justice may be late, but not absent.
message.noellesroles.hotline.report.alre: §cYou've already reported today. Come back tomorrow.
